R-16と黒\\\\\\\\一子をかかえるところ。: The place to capture one Black stone at R-16.
この手で一路下に打って黒\\\\\\\\を封鎖するのも有力: Playing one line below to seal Black off is also effective.
この手で三路左に打つと、黒\\\\\\\\は白二子アタリから劫にはじく。: If playing three lines to the left, Black plays atari on two White stones and forces a ko.
この手で上ッパネは白一子をあてて中に出る。___白は黒\\\\\\\\一子をかか: For the upward hane, White puts one stone in atari and pushes out to the center. White should capture one Black stone.
この手で下にハネると、黒\\\\\\\\はキリチガえて右方に地固め: If hane-ing downward, Black plays crosscut and solidifies territory on the right.
この手で白Ｃ－３にオサエると白Ｆ－２にノビて攻め合いは黒\\\\\\\\悪い: If White blocks at C-3, White extends to F-2 and Black loses the capturing race.
この手でＢ－２に打つと、黒\\\\\\\\は三子、四子にアテを打ってからＡ－２に: If playing at B-2, Black plays atari on the three or four stones, then hane at A-2 creates ko.
この手でＣ－１６だと白ｂ－１７、黒\\\\\\\\Ｂ－１４、___白Ｄ－１８で黒: If playing at C-16, then White b-17, Black B-14, White D-18, and Black loses the capturing race.
この手でＦ－３は黒\\\\\\\\Ｃ－３で、Ｂ－２とＢ－５が見合い: If playing F-3, Black C-3 makes B-2 and B-5 miai.
この手でＦ－４にハネると白Ｄ－２: If hane at F-4, White D-2.
この手でＧ３だと黒\\\\\\\\Ｅ２から大コウになる。: If playing G3, Black E2 leads to a large ko.
この手でＨ－４にノビて左方を棄てて右方を固めるのも有力: Extending to H-4, abandoning the left to solidify the right, is also effective.
この手でＫ－５にノビると___白は黒\\\\\\\\一子をアテからＬ－５に出て行: If extending to K-5, White plays atari on one Black stone and pushes out at L-5.
この手でＬ１４ツギは黒\\\\\\\\Ｐ１４。: If connecting at L14, Black P14.
この手でＮ－５にツグと左方に頭を出す: If connecting at N-5, pushing out the head on the left side.
この手でＯ－１７にカケツグと白Ｌ－１８: If hanging connection at O-17, White L-18.
この手でＯ－１８にはねると黒\\\\\\\\はコウに持ち込む: If hane at O-18, Black takes it to ko.
この手でＰ－１６だと白Ｎ－１６から逃げ出す: If playing P-16, White escapes starting from N-16.
この手でＲ－１９はコウ: Playing R-19 for this move leads to ko.
この手は白Ｅ－６、黒\\\\\\\\Ｃ－６になるところ: This move leads to White E-6, Black C-6.
この手はＭ－４に打って左方の黒\\\\\\\\を生かしても仕方がないところ: Playing M-4 to save the left-side Black stones would be pointless here.
ツケコシ切るべからず、白のサバキ: Do not cut the crosscut attachment; White's sabaki.
一路右から外を塗りつけるのもある: Playing one line to the right to solidify the outside is also possible.
一路左に打つところだが、右方の白の生死が問題。: The place to play is one line to the left, but the life and death of White on the right is the issue.
下から押さえれば要の黒\\\\\\\\二子を抱えるが、、、: Blocking from below captures the vital two Black stones, but...
下をはねると黒\\\\\\\\は上に伸びて押さえ、左右の白を分断する: If hane below, Black extends upward, blocks, and splits the left and right White groups.
二子は棄てて、Ｑ－１３に打つところ: Sacrifice the two stones and play at Q-13.
左へのツケコシもある: A crosscut attachment to the left is also possible.
打つ時期が大切。: The timing of play is crucial.
無理手。___白はＥ－１６、黒\\\\\\\\Ｊ－１７になるところ: An unreasonable move. White should play E-16, Black J-17.
白が逆から押さえれば、黒\\\\\\\\Ｆ－２に飛ぶ: If White blocks from the other direction, Black jumps to F-2.
白は一路上に引いて譲るところ: White should pull back one line and concede.
白はＧ－４に譲歩するところ。: White should make a concession at G-4.
白はＰ－１８から余えて、黒\\\\\\\\Ｎ－１８、白Ｑ－１７となるところ。: White should play from P-18, then Black N-18, White Q-17.
白無理手。Ｇ２へ打つところ。: White's unreasonable move. Should play at G2.
白Ｑ１８三砲[に下がると、黒\\\\\\\\Ｏ１６ノビ、白Ｐ１６ツギ、黒\\\\: If White descends at Q18, Black extends O16, White connects P16, Black makes a two-space extension at L17. Even if Black cuts and captures several White stones, it is not good.
逆から余えると、黒\\\\\\\\は二段に余えて捨て石として、白Ｌ－１７の一子を: If blocking from the other direction, Black plays a two-step sacrifice and captures the White stone at L-17 in a ladder.
逆に受けると黒\\\\\\\\の鉄壁になる: If responding from the other side, it becomes Black's iron wall.
黒\\\\\\\\は白三砲[サガリの二路左に並ぶところ\\: Black should play two lines to the left of White's three-stone descent.
黒\\\\\\\\はＨ－２に譲歩するところ: Black should make a concession at H-2.
黒\\\\\\\\カケ継げば白アテから動き出す。: If Black makes a diagonal connection, White plays atari and starts moving out.
黒\\\\\\\\一路左でわたる。: Black connects one line to the left.
黒\\\\\\\\一路左上なら白第一手の二路下。: If Black plays one line upper-left, White's first move is two lines below.
黒\\\\\\\\上から押さえると、白Ｎ２、黒\\\\\\\\ヌキから白Ｑ５．: If Black blocks from above, White N2, Black captures, then White Q5.
黒\\\\\\\\Ｐ１８に押さえると、白Ｎ１８にノビ___黒\\\\\\\\抜く: If Black blocks at P18, White extends to N18. If Black captures, White O16...
Ｆ－５に抜くところ: The move is to capture at F-5.
